chakkar.probe: Chakkar kaisa lagta hai — aas-paas ghoomta hua lagta hai, ya aisa ki andhera aa jaayega, ya sirf kamzori lagti hai?

gas.probe: Gas kaise hoti hai — pet phoolna, dakar aana, jalan, ya kuch aur?

garmi.probe: Garmi kaisi lagti hai — andar se jalan, ya bahar se garam lagta hai?

kamzori.probe: Kamzori kaisi hai — haath-paon mein taaql nahi, ya neend aana, ya chakkar jaisi?

dard.probe: Dard kaisa hai — sui chubhne jaisa, marod jaisa, jalan jaisa, ya bhaari-bhaari?

jhunjhuni.probe: Jhunjhuni kaisi lagti hai — sui chubhne jaisi, ya sunn ho jaata hai?

mayakkam.probe: Mayakkam epdi irukku — sutradhu mathiri, illaati thoonganum mathiri?

soodu.probe: Soodu epdi irukku — udambu oosi mathiri eriyudha, illaati kaaycchal mathiri?
